creator: glewis@eyesbeyond.com
text:
This shouldn't have java as its primary category.  Please see

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/makefile-categories.html

I would suggest the main category for the port is in fact "databases",
which it currently doesn't have at all, despite the fact that its a
database.

In short, please put the port in databases/exist and have the CATEGORIES
set to "databases java".

-- 
Greg Lewis                          Email   : glewis@eyesbeyond.com
Eyes Beyond                         Web     : http://www.eyesbeyond.com
Information Technology              FreeBSD : glewis@FreeBSD.org
